pattern: A rooted-tree DP where each node combines the two longest valid downward chains from children whose character differs from its own, tracking the best through-node path globally.
hints: Build the children lists from the parent array, then think about the longest valid chain that goes downward starting at each node.
A child can extend its parent's chain only when their characters differ; for each node keep the two best extendable child chains.
The answer is the maximum over all nodes of one plus the sum of its two best differing-child chains (path length is counted in nodes), computed bottom-up.

edge_inputs.description: star where two differing children straddle the root
all same character so no edge may be used
long chain broken by a repeated character in the middle
balanced tree, best path crosses an internal node

stress.description: random rooted tree built by attaching each node to an earlier one, with random letters
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, min(size, 4000))
    parent = [-1]
    for i in range(1, n):
        parent.append(rng.randint(0, i - 1))
    s = ''.join(chr(ord('a') + rng.randint(0, 3)) for _ in range(n))
    return [parent, s]
stress.note: attaching node i to a strictly earlier node guarantees a valid acyclic rooted tree
